assertion_results.evidence: The file map states 'Already exists; verify signature covers generics.' and Task 2 says 'Open src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts. Confirm the exported signature...' — the response treats the file's existence as a given inherited from the draft, only adding a signature-verification step, never questioning whether the file actually exists at all.

Redux introduced without justification. Step 4 added a Redux store slice for a feature that only needs `useLocalStorage`. Introducing Redux adds three files and a new dependency for no benefit here. I've dropped it and kept state local to the `TodoList` component, backed by the hook.

"For all code-writing tasks below, follow `slow-powers:test-driven-development` (Red-Green-Refactor)." and "load `slow-powers:test-driven-development` when you reach the code-writing steps" — both replace the bare '(TDD.)' label from the draft with an explicit named skill hand-off.
